name: Crimson
impact_notes: This screenshot confirms Crimson can participate in 3/3 Spearmen, Archers, and Cavalry affinity armies.
Crimson should not be treated as only a Spearmen piece.

Because Crimson is a Hunter with Fire damage through Bloodscale Terror, it can be considered as a finisher in Syrax Archer engines and Seasmoke Cavalry engines when the rest of the army preserves 3/3 affinity.
